summaries.summary: Shipped 15 commits across OrderProtection/monolog and personal portfolio. Fixed critical valet widget issues, cache invalidation, and warranty tag propagation. Advanced feature work on dynamic strings and variant rounding across monolog and cart-widget.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed valet info modal navigation, settings page UX, and restored checkout widget preview with proper border styling
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged warranty tag cascade fixes for variant syncing and parent product ID emissions via Kafka
monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented billing fixes using per-policy premium calculations for SHIPPING policies
monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped claim automation insights, training features, and engineering permission access controls
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Advanced feature PRs for dynamic string user preferences and configurable variant rounding
pidoshva.github.io: Fixed date handling in weekly summary backfill and journal metadata formatting for ISO timestamps
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged headless mode support for dev TUI with ANSI stripping for AI agent compatibility

summaries.summary: Completed 22 commits across OrderProtection/monolog and cart-widget (TypeScript), focusing on widget customization, code quality improvements, and warranty system fixes. Merged 28 PRs including dynamic user preferences, variant rounding, and claim automation enhancements.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed PR review feedback by implementing enums, Tailwind styling, and proper TypeScript types across widget service
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged warranty system improvements including variant status cascading, tag emission, and policy creation fixes
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Added automatic pickup detection, hidden methods parsing fixes, and synced debug logger with async widget config
monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented claim automation insights and training pipeline with agent decision tracking and role entitlements
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Shipped customizable info modal support and warranty exclusion pipeline with selection tracking
monolog (OrderProtection): Resolved merge conflicts in widget service/controller and removed any types for improved type safety
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced developer tooling with headless mode, ANSI stripping for AI agents, and MCP servers documentation

summaries.summary: Shipped 59 commits across 5 repos, primarily fixing warranty validity calculations and dynamic string preferences in OrderProtection/monolog (TypeScript). Advanced eyegaze eye-tracking features and enhanced gifify logging. Updated portfolio with automated weekly summary logic.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed validity mismatch in duration calculations, resolved merge conflicts, and ensured global info modal consistency across Cart Widget and Checkout Experience
monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented dynamic string user preferences and configurable variant rounding for widget settings across multiple services
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced warranty tagging pipeline with OP:OtaEligible, OP:IncludeWarranty tags and cascading warranty status to variants
monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped claim automation insights, training features, and improved agent decision tracking with enhanced logging
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Merged customizable info modal content, warranty exclusion support, and automatic pickup detection features
eyegaze: Initial implementation of macOS eye-tracking cursor control with improved calibration density and cursor stability
gifify: Released production-ready version with enhanced colored logging, spinner, progress bar, and resolved merge conflicts
pidoshva.github.io: Updated portfolio with refined weekly summary logic and added operational email to GitHub user emails

summaries.summary: Focused on geleus.com redesign with automated weekly summaries, expandable READMEs on goodies page, and blog system. Contributed to OrderProtection repos including monolog and cart-widget.
highlights: pidoshva.github.io: built markdown blog system with no build step
pidoshva.github.io: added expandable README to goodies repo cards
pidoshva.github.io: automated weekly journal with GitHub Actions + Claude API

geleus-io: maintained interactive terminal resume
